requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 vs China GB/T
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 对比中国 GB/T
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 對比中國 GB/T

summary.en: Djibouti has French/IEC electrical legacy and regional vehicle-import exposure, so EV charging projects should be designed around the IEC 62196 connector ecosystem unless a project specification states otherwise. AC charging should be checked against IEC 62196-2 Type 2, and DC fast charging against IEC 62196-3 configuration FF / CCS2. This is the IEC direction; it is not an Americas SAE J1772 / CCS1 market assumption. Because Djibouti's EV market is nascent and public rules are limited, connector requirements should be confirmed in the tender, CPO specification, fleet requirement, or site-owner standard before quoting.
summary.zh: 吉布提具有法国/IEC 电气体系遗留并受区域车辆进口影响，因此除非项目规范另有规定，电动汽车充电项目应按 IEC 62196 接口体系设计。交流充电应按 IEC 62196-2 Type 2 核对，直流快充应按 IEC 62196-3 FF 配置 / CCS2 核对。这是 IEC 方向，而不是美洲 SAE J1772 / CCS1 市场假设。由于吉布提电动汽车市场仍处早期且公开规则有限，报价前应在招标、充电运营商规范、车队要求或场地方标准中确认接口要求。
summary.zht: 吉布地具有法國/IEC 電氣體系遺留並受區域車輛進口影響，因此除非項目規範另有規定，電動汽車充電項目應按 IEC 62196 接口體系設計。交流充電應按 IEC 62196-2 Type 2 核對，直流快充應按 IEC 62196-3 FF 配置 / CCS2 核對。這是 IEC 方向，而不是美洲 SAE J1772 / CCS1 市場假設。由於吉布地電動汽車市場仍處早期且公開規則有限，報價前應在招標、充電運營商規範、車隊要求或場地方標準中確認接口要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-3 — CCS2 / configuration FF DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging general requirements
IEC 61851-23 and IEC 61851-24 — DC EVSE and DC communication

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers with GB/T 27930 CAN communication for DC charging. GB/T AC connectors are not a direct Type 2 substitute because connector gender, pilot signalling, contact arrangement, and certification evidence differ. GB/T DC connectors and GB/T 27930 communication are not compatible with CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 deployments.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用 GB/T 20234.2 耦合器，直流充电桩采用 GB/T 20234.3 耦合器并通过 GB/T 27930 CAN 通信进行直流充电。GB/T 交流接口不能直接替代 Type 2，因为接口性别、导引信号、触点排列和认证证据不同。GB/T 直流接口及 GB/T 27930 通信与 CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 部署不兼容。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用 GB/T 20234.2 耦合器，直流充電樁採用 GB/T 20234.3 耦合器並通過 GB/T 27930 CAN 通訊進行直流充電。GB/T 交流接口不能直接替代 Type 2，因為接口性別、導引信號、觸點排列和認證證據不同。GB/T 直流接口及 GB/T 27930 通訊與 CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 部署不兼容。

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for a Djibouti IEC Type 2 / CCS2 deployment. Conversion requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable set, locking system, proximity and control pilot circuits, labels, spare parts, temperature-rise evidence, and DC communication stack. Adapters should not be treated as a compliance substitute for a project-specified Type 2 or CCS2 design.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国 GB/T 接口的充电桩不适用于吉布提 IEC Type 2 / CCS2 部署。转换需要重新设计耦合器、电缆组件、锁止系统、接近导引和控制导引电路、标签、备件、温升证据以及直流通信栈。不应将转接器视为项目指定 Type 2 或 CCS2 设计的合规替代品。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國 GB/T 接口的充電樁不適用於吉布地 IEC Type 2 / CCS2 部署。轉換需要重新設計耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止系統、接近導引和控制導引電路、標籤、備件、溫升證據以及直流通訊棧。不應將轉接器視為項目指定 Type 2 或 CCS2 設計的合規替代品。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Type 2 / CCS2 is required by tender, CPO, fleet, site-owner, or project specification; public national EVSE connector rules were not confirmed, so the project specification controls
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Djibouti as an IEC Type 2 / CCS2 direction unless the project states another connector. China GB/T 20234 hardware and GB/T 27930 DC communication are physically and protocol incompatible with Type 2 / CCS2 deployments.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 除非项目另行规定接口，应将吉布提按 IEC Type 2 / CCS2 方向处理。中国 GB/T 20234 硬件及 GB/T 27930 直流通信与 Type 2 / CCS2 部署在物理和协议层面均不兼容。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 除非項目另行規定接口，應將吉布地按 IEC Type 2 / CCS2 方向處理。中國 GB/T 20234 硬體及 GB/T 27930 直流通訊與 Type 2 / CCS2 部署在物理和協議層面均不兼容。
